name: Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F.
2. Place egg yolks in a mixing bowl.
3. Heat cream, half-and-half, and granulated sugar until warm.
4. Slowly stir the warmed mixture into the yolks.
5. Place six ramekins in a baking tray and fill each with the custard mixture.
6. Fill the tray two-thirds full with hot water.
7. Bake for 1-1/2 to 2 hours, or until set.
8. Remove from oven and chill.
9. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of demerara sugar on top of each ramekin.
10. Under a very hot broiler, glaze the sugar until it is lightly browned.
11. Return the ramekins to the refrigerator to cool before serving.
